inputs.prompt:
A hand-drawn anime-style Formula 1 race car driving smoothly along a wide open road, inspired by Hayao Miyazaki and Studio Ghibli aesthetics.

The F1 car feels lightweight and elegant rather than aggressive, gliding forward as if carried by the wind.

Vast green fields, rolling hills, and distant mountains stretch across the landscape, with tall grass gently swaying as the car passes.

Bright blue sky filled with large fluffy clouds, sunlight breaking through softly, creating a warm and hopeful atmosphere.

The car moves fast but calmly, leaving subtle wind trails and dust strokes drawn in a painterly, hand-animated style.

Smooth side-tracking and wide cinematic shots, slow and poetic pacing despite the sense of speed.

Soft watercolor color palette, clean linework, gentle shading, classic Japanese animation style.

Whimsical, nostalgic, and uplifting mood, evoking freedom, adventure, and childhood wonder.

High-quality anime animation, smooth motion, film-like softness.

No text, no logos, no watermarks.
